text: Hi, I am Krishna, not the founder, not the CEO, just Krishna. Thank you for taking a few minutes to listen. Before I tell you about Khlozai, I want to tell you about one day that changed my life. A little while ago on 16th of June, my daughter was born. It was the happiest day of my life, but somehow it was also one of the loneliest. In that room, there were only a few of us. My wife, my parents, our new baby, my sister-in-law who stayed with us the whole time and my in-laws. Everyone else I loved was far away. There was no crowd outside the door, no phone ringing again and again. For a few minutes everything was quiet. I held my daughter for the first time and I wanted to tell the whole world, but I realized I had almost no one to call. Then one thought came to my mind. The same thought every parent has. What will happen to her if something happens to me? I did not want someone to replace her family. I wanted something that could make her family stronger, someone she can trust when we can't be there. Then I understood something. Millions of families feel the same way. Parents getting older, children living far away in other countries. Grandparents missing birthdays. Every night someone is thinking, are they okay? That was the moment Khlozai became real for me. It was no longer just an idea. It became my responsibility so that no family has to face life's biggest moments alone. We don't replace families. We make them stronger. We don't replace sons and daughters. We help them stay close even from far away. We help families care for each other with love, respect and trust. Every visit, every message, every companion, every call is a family trust in us. When you join Khlozai, you are not just joining a company. You are becoming someone's trusted presence. That day I made one more promise. Khlozai should not grow only for its founders. It should grow with the people who build it. Work like an owner. Be honest. Protect trust because trust is not built by software. Trust is built by people. Every year on 16th of June, we will celebrate Family Day to remember why Khlozai exists. That every request is real a family and that no app can replace a real person being there. One day I hope you will meet my daughter not because she is a brand but because she reminds us why this work matters. Every child deserves grandparents. Every grandparent deserves a child after. And every family deserves to stay close however far apart they live. Please remember one thing. Every notification, every call, every visit, every decision is about someone's family. Because of your work, someone will sleep peacefully tonight. This is our responsibility. This is our honor. Welcome to Khlozai. Thank you for believing in this mission. Thank you for becoming part of Khlozai. Together let's build the world's most trusted presence network.
